news-global-econ.title: Trump accuses Pope Leo of being 'terrible' on foreign policy over anti-war comments
news-global-econ.description: President Donald Trump accused Pope Leo XIV of being "terrible" on foreign policy as the pontiff continues to criticize the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran and call for peace.

news-global-econ.description: New York Mayor Mamdani highlights stark racial wealth gap in city report but sidesteps questions about why DEI language was removed from the document.

news-global-soc.title: Pope Leo XIV to visit fastest-growing Catholic continent during 4-nation Africa trip
news-global-soc.description: Pope Leo XIV begins a four-nation African visit Monday, traveling to the fastest-growing continent for the Catholic Church on his fourth foreign trip.

news-global-soc.title: Trump details sweeping 'all or nothing' blockade of Strait of Hormuz after failed Iran talks
